title: Conformal prediction sets on frozen foundation-model embeddings for WHO-TPP-aligned tuberculosis chest X-ray triage — Analysis Code
description: Reproducibility code for: Conformal prediction sets on frozen foundation-model embeddings for WHO-TPP-aligned tuberculosis chest X-ray triage: a multi-cohort derivation and external validation study. Includes all analysis scripts, Colab notebooks for GPU-intensive steps, pre-computed results, and an interactive Streamlit demo.
